name: session-09
title: RRP x Onchain x DeFi Yield
notes: Requires FRED_API_KEY for RRP. Space the Cboe follow-up away from session-02 when executing live.

entries.text: RRP matters more when it is framed as a trajectory than as a lonely level. If the facility is rebounding, idle collateral demand is still returning to the surface instead of fading cleanly.
Half-hour fee is the calmer sibling of the fastest inclusion price. It is a better read on routine onchain demand than a peak urgency number that might vanish on the next block.
The protocols table still shows where stable-focused liquidity is actually parked. One ranked TVL surface is enough to see whether defensive onchain capital is concentrated or diffused.
A bare VIX9D print is still worth publishing when the point is immediate short-window stress, not a layered macro thesis. The number alone already says whether near-term fear is quiet or active.
